subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy pure-hearted son traversed the desert that his face might touch the hallowed dust of the sacred Threshold, and might breathe its sanctified fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده یزدان پسر پاک گهرت بادیه پیمود تا رخ بخاک پاک آستان مقدس بسود و مشام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @law of pilgrimage, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
